## What & why

What does this change do, and why? Link any related issue (`Fixes #123`).

## How it was verified

How did you test this? (commands, screenshots, manual steps)

## Checklist

- [ ] Lint, types, and tests pass locally (`ruff` + `mypy` / ESLint + Prettier; backend tests)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Updated docs (`docs/guide/`) and `CHANGELOG.md` (Unreleased) if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials committed
- [ ] Security-sensitive surfaces (auth, secrets, config I/O, the agent, subprocess) called out for review
